reason: Row 2 'Retained earnings'. BHCA+item P743 does not exist in MDRM. Retained earnings in the FR Y-9C 'Regulatory Capital Components and Ratios' series (same series as P742/P840/P793) is BHCA KW00, name 'Retained Earnings' (FR Y-9C, current). The legacy 3247 retained-earnings code exists only as BHCK/RCFD/RCON (Schedule HC balance sheet), not BHCA, so KW00 is the correct HC-R CET1 build-up code. Vintage note: KW00 effective 2019-03-31 (CSV start_date 2014-03-31 predates the mnemonic).

Row 3 'AOCI (opt-out)' = the AOCI amount. BHCA+P744 absent. BHCA B530 'ACCUMULATED OTHER COMPREHENSIVE INCOME' (FR Y-9C, 2014+) is the AOCI line on HC-R Part I. (P838, the AOCI opt-out 1/0 election flag, is a separate item kept on row 4.)
Row 33 'Tier 1 capital ratio' (note: Tier 1 / RWA = risk-based). BHCA+P794 absent. BHCA 7206 'TIER 1 RISK-BASED CAPITAL RATIO' (FR Y-9C, 2014+) is the exact concept.
Row 34 'Total capital ratio' (note: Total capital / RWA). BHCA+P795 absent. BHCA 7205 'TOTAL RISK-BASED CAPITAL RATIO' (FR Y-9C, 2014+) is the exact concept.
Row 35 'Leverage ratio' (note: Tier 1 / Average assets). BHCA+P796 absent. BHCA 7204 'TIER 1 LEVERAGE CAPITAL RATIO' (FR Y-9C, 2014+) is the exact concept.

Token appears inside the free-text 'description' column, which is the verbatim official MDRM description for the row's own code BHCP2723 ('Includes the sum of Loans; Net of Unearned Income (BHCK0364) plus...'). The row's actual code cell is mnemonic=BHCP, item_code=2723 (BHCP2723 = valid, FR Y-9LP). BHCK0364 is a historical component code referenced within MDRM's canonical description prose, not the row's code cell. Not forced to a substitute; the row code BHCP2723 is correct.
row2 mdrm_foreign. FR Y-9C HC-C has no foreign-office (BHFN) breakdown for real-estate loans; no BHFN1410 (or any BHFN) code exists for this category. The foreign column is not reported.
row3 mdrm_foreign. No BHFN code exists for construction/land-development loans; FR Y-9C HC-C is not split by foreign offices for this category.
row11 mdrm_foreign. No BHFN code exists for multifamily loans; FR Y-9C HC-C has no foreign-office breakdown.
row14 mdrm_foreign. No BHFN code exists for nonfarm nonresidential loans; no foreign-office breakdown on FR Y-9C HC-C.

BHCK1652 not in MDRM under any mnemonic; only the aggregate 'MORTGAGE SERVICING ASSETS' (BHCK3164) exists. FR Y-9C never reported a purchased-vs-sold MSA split, so this sub-line is fabricated. No successor.

Loans and leases (quarterly average). Correct consolidated code is BHCK3516 = 'QUARTERLY AVERAGES OF LOANS AND LEASES' (FR Y-9C HC-K, active). 3360 at BHC level is not a valid code; '3360' is the Call-Report total-loans QA item, not the BHC loans-and-leases item.

Interest-bearing balances. FR Y-9C Schedule HC-K has no consolidated quarterly-average code for interest-bearing balances; the concept exists only at Call-Report level (RCFD3381 = 'QUARTERLY AVERAGE OF INTEREST-BEARING BALANCES DUE FROM DEPOSITORY INSTITUTIONS', which is valid and unflagged). No BHCK QA replacement exists.; v7.0: schedule CSV rebuilt from official FR Y-9C form, code removed

Interest-bearing deposits (total, parent line). FR Y-9C HC-K does not report a single combined 'total interest-bearing deposits' quarterly average; it splits into domestic offices (BHCK3517) and foreign offices (BHCK3404). No consolidated total-IB-deposits QA code exists. (3387 at Call level is the C&I-loans QA item, RCON3387.); v7.0: schedule CSV rebuilt from official FR Y-9C form, code removed

Total deposits (memorandum). FR Y-9C HC-K has no consolidated 'total deposits' quarterly-average code. (3388 at Call level is the loans-to-individuals QA item, RCON3388.) No valid BHCK QA replacement exists.; v7.0: schedule CSV rebuilt from official FR Y-9C form, code removed

Item 26.a undivided profits; FR Y-9C has a single retained-earnings line BHCK3247='UNDIVIDED PROFITS AND CAPITAL RESERVES (RETAINED EARNINGS)'. 3632 not valid for BHCK. Note: maps to same code as item 26 (Y-9C does not separate 26.a).

Row22 mdrm_code 'Service charges on deposits' (item 6.a). No BHCK4080 exists (4080 is the Call code RIAD4080). On FR Y-9C this line = BHCK4483 'SERVICE CHARGES ON DEPOSIT ACCOUNTS', active (1981-present). Confirmed via BHCK4079 component note.

Row13 mdrm_code 'Interest on deposits' (item 2.a). No BHCK4170 exists; FR Y-9C splits deposit interest into 4174/4176/4172, so no single consolidated BHCK code. RIAD4170 = 'INTEREST ON DEPOSITS', exact name (Call code, discontinued 2016 but valid historical flow; per income-flow=RIAD rule).

Row17 mdrm_code 'Interest on subordinated debt' (item 2.e). CSV swapped 2.d/2.e codes; 4190=borrowed money. Correct concept code is 4200. No BHCK4200 exists; RIAD4200 = 'INTEREST ON NOTES AND DEBENTURES SUBORDINATED TO DEPOSITS', exact concept match.

Row16 mdrm_code 'Interest on borrowed money' (item 2.d). CSV swapped 2.d/2.e codes; 4200=sub-debt. Correct concept code is 4190. No BHCK4190 exists; RIAD4190 = 'INTEREST ON OTHER BORROWED MONEY', exact name (on modern FR Y-9C folded into BHCK4185 'interest on trading liabilities and other borrowed money', which is already used by row15).

Row45 mdrm_code 'Cash dividends declared on preferred stock' (M2). BHCK4461 = wrong concept ('first itemized amount >10%'). No BHCK4470 exists (4470 is Call code RIAD4470). FR Y-9C code = BHCK4598 'LESS: CASH DIVIDENDS DECLARED ON PERPETUAL PREFERRED STOCK', active, description covers all preferred incl. limited-life. Exact concept match.

Row29 mdrm_code 'Insurance commissions and fees' (item 6.h). BHCK4840 = wrong concept (intl NII). BHCKB494 = 'INSURANCE COMMISSIONS AND FEES', FR Y-9C, exact name; active 2001-2002 then split into BHCKC386 (underwriting) + BHCKC387 (other insurance/sales) from 2003. B494 is the exact-name historical code for this line.

BHCK5370 is not in MDRM as this concept (5370 = 'Adjustable rate closed-end 1-4 family residential loans', RCON only). For the flagged 90-days-still-accruing column of restructured/troubled-debt loans the code was BHCK1659 'RESTRUCTURED LOANS AND LEASES OTHER LOANS AND LEASES - PAST DUE 90 DAYS OR MORE AND STILL ACCRUING' (FR Y-9C), discontinued 12/31/2010.

BHCK5371 is not in MDRM as this concept (5371 = 'Excess residential mortgage servicing fees receivable', discontinued 1996). For the flagged nonaccrual column of restructured/troubled-debt loans the code was BHCK1661 'RESTRUCTURED LOANS AND LEASES OTHER LOANS AND ALL LEASES - NONACCRUAL' (FR Y-9C), discontinued 12/31/2010.
Item 9; BHCK3656='DIRECT AND INDIRECT INVESTMENTS IN REAL ESTATE VENTURES' (FR Y-9C). 5372 not in MDRM; item number was wrong.

BHCK5527 is not in MDRM (5527 exists only as CRCB on FFIEC 002s). For the flagged 90-days-past-due-and-still-accruing column of total 'Loans secured by real estate', the historical code was BHCK1422 'LOANS SECURED BY REAL ESTATE - PAST DUE 90 DAYS OR MORE AND STILL ACCRUING' (FR Y-9C), discontinued 12/31/2000 when HC-N moved to domestic-office subcategory detail. No active aggregate-RE past-due code exists.

Row 53 RC-B M2 Total HTM securities, FR Y-9C equivalent of RCFDJJ34. BHCTJJ34 does not exist; BHCKJJ34 = 'Held to maturity securities (ASU 2016-13 adoption)' (FR Y-9C, 2019-03-31 to open). Consolidated HTM total scope matches.

Token sits inside the free-text 'description' column ('...used in conjunction with the value reported in BONB6798.'), not in an item-code cell. Code-shaped string in prose; the intended in-text reference is the row's own BHAS6798.
Code-shaped string in the 'description' prose ('...reported in BONB6799.'). Row code cell is BHAS6799. 'BONB' is not a valid MDRM mnemonic. Prose reference, not a code cell.
Code-shaped string in the 'description' prose ('...reported in BONB6800.'). Row code cell is BHAS6800. 'BONB' is not a valid MDRM mnemonic. Prose reference, not a code cell.

'FFIEC009' is the NAME of the FFIEC 009 Country Exposure Report, appearing literally in description prose ('FFIEC009 (FCEX) - ...'), not an MDRM code. The actual data rows carry valid mnemonics FCEX (FFIEC 009) and CEXA (FFIEC 009a). Extractor false positive on the form label; never a code.

'FFIEC101' is a form name appearing in the 'description' prose ('AASAC050: FFIEC101 Schedule S is Operational Risk'), not an MDRM code (no item number; not a mnemonic+item pattern). The row's actual code is mnemonic=AASA, item_code=C050. Form-name string in prose.

Row 60 RC-R Part I-35 Total Capital (FFIEC 031, RC-R Part I capital uses RCFA). RCFAA225 does not exist (only RCON A225 = a discontinued 1996-97 time-deposit item). The Basel III total-capital code is RCFA3792 = 'TOTAL QUALIFYING CAPITAL ALLOWABLE UNDER THE RISK-BASED CAPITAL GUIDELINES' (FFIEC 031, 2014-03-31 to open), the FFIEC-031 analog of the (correct) y9c_mdrm BHCA3792.
Call counterpart of row 2 'Retained earnings'. RCFA+P743 absent; RCFA KW00 'Retained Earnings' exists (FFIEC RC-R, current, 2019+) and parallels BHCA KW00.
Call counterpart of row 3 AOCI amount. RCFA+P744 absent; RCFA B530 'ACCUMULATED OTHER COMPREHENSIVE INCOME' exists (FFIEC, 2014+).
Call counterpart of Tier 1 risk-based capital ratio. RCFA 7206 'TIER 1 RISK-BASED CAPITAL RATIO' exists (FFIEC, 2014+).
Call counterpart of total risk-based capital ratio. RCFA 7205 'TOTAL RISK-BASED CAPITAL RATIO' exists (FFIEC, 2014+).
Call counterpart of Tier 1 leverage ratio. RCFA 7204 'TIER 1 LEVERAGE CAPITAL RATIO' exists (FFIEC, 2014+).

Row 4 keeps BHCA P838 'A. AOCI OPT-OUT ELECTION (ENTER 1 FOR YES; 0 FOR NO)' (not flagged). The call counterpart of item P838 exists ONLY as RCOA P838 (RCFA/RCFD/RCON P838 all absent). The opt-out election is reported under the RCOA mnemonic on Call Schedule RC-R, so RCFAP838 -> RCOAP838 to match the BHCA anchor.
Call item 1.a; RCFD0081='NONINTEREST-BEARING BALANCES AND CURRENCY AND COIN'. 0395 was interest-bearing.
Call item 1.b; RCFD0071='INTEREST-BEARING BALANCES'. 0397 not valid on call RC.
RCFD1652 not in MDRM under any mnemonic; only aggregate RCFD3164 'MORTGAGE SERVICING ASSETS' exists. Call Report never reported a purchased-vs-sold MSA split; sub-line fabricated. No successor.

Interest-bearing deposits (total), Call-Report side. The Call Report has no single 'total interest-bearing deposits' quarterly-average; it reports deposit components (time deposits RCON A514/A529, foreign RCFD/RCON3404, transaction/MMDA/savings averages), not a combined total. Candidate RCFDB914 'INTEREST-BEARING DEPOSITS' is a period-end balance, NOT a quarterly average, so rejected. No valid QA replacement.

Total deposits (memorandum), Call-Report side. The Call Report has no single 'total deposits' quarterly-average code (RCON3388 is the loans-to-individuals QA item; RCFD3388 does not exist). Candidate RCFD2200 'TOTAL DEPOSITS' is a period-end balance, NOT a quarterly average, so rejected. No valid QA replacement.

Total equity capital (quarterly average), Call-Report side. Equity-capital quarterly average is a Y-9C/BHC concept (BHCK3519 = 'QUARTERLY AVERAGE OF EQUITY CAPITAL', which is valid and is the correct code in this same CSV row). The Call Report does not report an equity-capital quarterly average; RCFD3519 is not a valid MDRM code.

RCFD4659 not in MDRM (BHCK4659 exists but = charge-offs on lease financing, wrong concept). BOLI cash-surrender-value code is RCFDC009 = 'CASH SURRENDER VALUE OF LIFE INSURANCE' (FFIEC 031, 2001-03-31 to 2010; discontinued 2011). Since 2011 BOLI is split into general (K201), separate (K202) and hybrid (K270) account life insurance assets with no single aggregate code.

Total earning assets (quarterly average), Call-Report equivalent. RCFD3402 = 'QUARTERLY AVERAGE OF EARNING ASSETS' confirmed in MDRM (Schedule RC-K). RCFDA517 is not a valid MDRM code (note: BHCKA517/RCFDA517 in MDRM, where it exists, is an interest-expense item, not a QA).

Total interest-bearing liabilities. Neither Schedule RC-K nor HC-K reports a 'total interest-bearing liabilities' quarterly average; it is a derived sum of the component QA lines, not a reported MDRM item. RCFDA518 is not a valid MDRM code and has no QA replacement.

B027 is the wrong concept (BHCKB027 = 'SIXTH TEXT OF NOTES TO ITEMS ON BALANCE SHEET'; no RCFDB027). 'Total mortgage servicing assets' = RCFD3164 = 'MORTGAGE SERVICING ASSETS' (FFIEC 031, 1985-06-30 to open). Concept match for total MSA.
Total loans (quarterly average), Call-Report equivalent. RCFD3360 = 'QUARTERLY AVERAGE OF TOTAL LOANS' confirmed in MDRM (Schedule RC-K). RCFDB561 is not a valid MDRM code.

Lease financing receivables (quarterly average), Call-Report equivalent. RCFD3484 = 'LEASE FINANCING RECEIVABLES (NET OF UNEARNED INCOME) - QUARTERLY AVERAGE' confirmed in MDRM (Schedule RC-K). RCFDB562 is not a valid MDRM code.

Other earning assets. The Call Report Schedule RC-K has no quarterly-average code for 'other earning assets' (it reports total earning assets, RCFD3402, plus specific asset components, but no residual 'other earning assets' QA line). RCFDB574 is not a valid MDRM code and has no Call QA replacement for this concept.
